welcome_message:
Welcome to the Lakeflow Framework pipeline bundle template.

You'll be prompted for a few details to scaffold a new pipeline bundle.
Defaults are provided in [brackets]; press Enter to accept them.

project_name.description: Project Name (used as the DAB bundle name and the root folder of the generated project)
project_name.pattern_match_failure_message: Project name must start with a lowercase letter and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and underscores (minimum 3 characters).

pipeline_name.description: Pipeline Name (used in the initial pipeline resource yml filename and as the dataflow group folder under src/dataflows/)
pipeline_name.pattern_match_failure_message: Pipeline name must start with a lowercase letter and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and underscores.

layer.description: Layer (medallion layer for this bundle's pipeline)

catalog.description: Catalog (target Unity Catalog catalog for this bundle's outputs - baked into the catalog DAB variable default)

schema.description: Schema (target Unity Catalog schema for this bundle's outputs - baked into the schema DAB variable default)

include_example_dataflows.description: Include Example Dataflow? (recommended for new users)

example_target_table.description: Example Target Table (name of the target table this example dataflow produces - drives dataFlowId, flowGroupId, filenames, etc.)

example_source_table.description: Example Source Table (name of the upstream source table the example dataflow reads from)

source_catalog.description: Source Catalog (Unity Catalog catalog where the example_source_table lives - pre-populated into dev_substitutions.json so the bundle works without manual edits)

source_schema.description: Source Schema (Unity Catalog schema where the example_source_table lives - pre-populated into dev_substitutions.json)

success_message:
Project '{{.project_name}}' created.

Next steps:
  cd {{.project_name}}
  databricks bundle validate --target dev
  databricks bundle deploy --target dev

What's left for you to fill in (the variable-length scaffolding):
  - src/dataflows/{{.pipeline_name}}/schemas/{{.example_target_table}}_schema.json.example
      (replace the <FIELD NAME> / <FIELD TYPE> placeholders with your actual table columns, then remove the '.example' file suffix)
  - src/dataflows/{{.pipeline_name}}/expectations/{{.example_target_table}}_dqe.json.example
      (define your data quality constraints then remove the '.example' file suffix, or delete the file if not needed)
  - src/pipeline_configs/dev_substitutions.json
      (the SOURCE_CAT_SCHEMA token is already wired up; add more tokens here if you need them)
  - src/pipeline_configs/prod_substitutions.json.example
      (add prefix/suffix config and include more tokens here if you need them, then remove the '.example' file suffix)

The framework_source_path default in databricks.yml assumes the Lakeflow Framework's
'dev' target is deployed. Override per-environment in your DAB targets if needed.
